Defendant Officer Dante Giovanelli'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- TERRY MORGAN, TEL. NO. 240-9960, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. Defendant Officer Dante Giovanelli'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And First Amended Complaint IS GRANTED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION DOES NOT RESPOND TO SUBSTANTIVE ISSUES RAISED BY DEFENDANT GIOVANELLI. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joshua White, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4259 for defendant and moving party City and County of San Francisco
Terry Morgan, 415-240-9960, plaintiff and opposing party appearing propria

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court ruled as follows --
Defendant City And County Of San Francisco's Demurrer To First Amended Complaint IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF WAIVED SERVICE. 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT DUE ON OR BEFORE 8/30/2010. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
